description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.30.0 ports upstream provider usage updates, including Antigravity per-model quotas, DeepSeek usage summaries, OpenAI project scoping, StepFun token refresh, Alibaba Token Plan endpoint updates, Ollama pacing windows, Codex sign-in guidance, and Windows UI polish.
